items.creator: 开普勒
items.title: Timing with Planetary Periods
items.summary:
The planets' cycles are foundational building blocks to many astrological techniques and their fingerprints are found in some of the most popular methods for timing events.

The 2nd century astrologer Vettius Valens described a timing technique that uses a planet's synodic recurrence cycle, usually known as the minor or lesser years of a planet, to time a planet's activation.

Understanding these encoded cycles reveals a cornerstone for when to expect the seeds of the natal promise to come to fruition in one's life. Using Book VII of Valens' Anthology as our guide, we will shed light on this technique, learn how to apply it using chart examples, and consider the cyclic and fractal nature of time.

To join the class 'Planetary Periods and Ascensional Times: Valens’ Timing Technique', starting August 1, visit: https://store.keplercollege.org/product/planetary-periods-and-ascensional-times-valens-timing-technique/

Learn more about our Hellenistic Timing Techniques Certificate here: https://www.keplercollege.org/certificates/hellenistic-timing-techniques/

#astrology #hellenisticastrology #keplercollege 

Chapters:

00:00 Introduction
02:36 Introduction to Planetary Cycles: An overview of sidereal, tropical, and synodic periods.
06:04 Minor, Mean, and Greater Years: Explanation of the different year categories and the Metonic cycle.
11:12 Solar Phase Cycle: Breaking down the synodic cycle, including conjunctions, stations, and heliacal risings/settings.
16:46 Natural Significations: A look at planetary significations and the influence of Stoic philosophy.
22:41 Vettius Valens & Book VII: Introduction to the 2nd-century astrologer Vettius Valens and his work.
26:45 Timing Technique Details: How to apply planetary periods and ascensional times to time events.
34:54 Case Study 1: Robert Frank: Applying Saturn's minor period to the life of photographer Robert Frank.
40:20 Case Study 2: David Wojnarowicz: Applying Jupiter's minor period to the artist David Wojnarowicz.
45:19 Universal Timing & Fractals: Discussion on the nature of timing lords, fractals, and the arrow of time.
59:09 Q&A Session
1:15:00 Conclusion


Recorded June 2026

Opinion Disclaimer: All views expressed by the host and the guest(s) are solely theirs and may not reflect the views of Kepler College. Please keep your comments respectful. Thank you.

during the Venus Jupiter conjunction. But the person messed up with that moon Saturn conjunction 🙂‍↔️ 

I predict it will be stopped. 

But still - THIS IS NOT OKAY.

The war on words continues. 

Everything is online. I just found out about this. 

Full episode on all the details of the trademark issue with astrocartography on my Cosmic Compass podcast and Helena Woods Astrology channel on YouTube, highly recommend listening to astrocartographer legend Robert Currey #astrocartography

He’s the astrocartography OG for any of you new to this work! 🗺️

items.creator: 占星播客
items.title: Thema Mundi: How the Planets Came to Rule Two Zodiac Signs
items.summary:
This is an animation of an ancient Persian myth about how the traditional planets came to rule two signs of the zodiac in astrology. 

The narration and script with some embellishments on the original story are by Chris Brennan, and the animation was done by Jack Cusumano.

The original myth is preserved in Codices Vaticani 15, fol. 229, edited in CCAG 5, pt. 2 pp. 130-37 by I. Bidez, privately translated by Demetra George.
